name: tiktok-yap-editor
description: Turn raw phone clips into finished vertical TikTok/Reels/Shorts. Mode A talking-head: transcript-first cut, zero dead air, brand captions, an auto-fitted on-screen hook that never clips, automatic stutter/restart catching. Mode B day-in-the-life: script the voiceover, lock picture to b-roll, record to a guide. Brand-agnostic via first-run discovery.
